Who I am

Engineer.
Strategist.
Yachtmaster.

A maritime professional with a dual background in Naval Architecture and Technology Management — combining deep technical expertise with proven leadership across shipyards, infrastructure and premium yacht service.

Over a decade of international experience at Damen Shipyards, Royal BAM Group and Wajer Yachts. RYA/MCA Yachtmaster Offshore certified and actively sailing European waters.

Contact me View LinkedIn →

What I do

Naval Architecture & Engineering

Ship design, stability analysis, weight control and outfitting for offshore vessels, expedition yachts and premium motor yachts.

StabilityOffshoreOutfitting

Project & Technical Leadership

Delivering complex, multi-stakeholder projects on time and on budget — from PLM transformations to large-scale infrastructure works.

Prince2AgilePLM

Yacht Deliveries & Charters

RYA/MCA Yachtmaster Offshore. Professional sail and motor yacht deliveries and skippered charters across European waters.
